Row.Text: This upgrade adds +50% [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production towards all units, +15% Strength when fighting in friendly territory, and +30 experience to any unit built in this city.
This upgrade adds +50% [ICON_PRODUCTION] Production towards all units, +15% Strength when fighting in friendly territory, and +30 experience to any unit built in this city.
